items.caption: A slide with a red background and yellow text, discussing the historical event of book burning. the text is a summary of a decree by a figure in 213 bce, stating that all history and philosophy books were to be burned, except for legal, medical, and agricultural texts. the slide includes a visual of a burning book, with flames engulfing the pages, symbolizing the destruction of knowledge. the text is presented in a formal, educational style, likely from a presentation or lecture.
